name: taskmaster
description: Latest channel — v3 schema. Universal AI-powered task and backlog management plus narrative continuity: handovers, lessons, issues, recap, snapshot/PreCompact, auto-task / auto-epic / auto-phase state machines. Per-task files (.taskmaster/tasks/<id>.md) with slim YAML index. v2 backlogs keep working unchanged; opt into v3 via `backlog_init schema_version=3` or `backlog_migrate_v3`. Requires: uv (https://docs.astral.sh/uv/)
